startApp.title: Discover the world of coffee
startApp.subtitle: From bean to cup, learn everything about coffee and making the perfect cup.

requestResetCode.title: Forgot password
requestResetCode.subtitle: Enter your email address and we will send you a code to reset your password.

verifyResetCode.title: Verify your Reset Code
verifyResetCode.subtitle: We have sent an 8-digit code to your email address. Enter it below.

currentBehaviour.title: How do you currently make coffee?
currentBehaviour.subtitle: Choose the ways you drink coffee.

experienceLevel.title: What is your coffee experience?
experienceLevel.subtitle: We tailor your learning path based on what you already know.

optionDescriptions.tasteEnjoyer: I drink coffee mainly for the socializing.
optionDescriptions.curious: I have heard terms like grind size or roast before.
optionDescriptions.connoisseur: An Arabica / Robusta is nothing new to me.

goal.title: What would you like to achieve?
goal.subtitle: Choose your main goal. Don't worry, we cover everything, but we tailor your learning path accordingly.

optionLabels.tastingSkills: I want to learn to recognize and describe flavors.
optionLabels.perfectEspresso: I want to learn how to make the perfect espresso.
optionLabels.latteArt: I want to focus on milk texture and creating beautiful latte art.
optionLabels.beanToCup: I want to learn the whole process, from the plantation to the cup.

currentPreferences.title: What kind of coffee drinker are you?
currentPreferences.subtitle: Do you like a bold classic or do you prefer to seek out fruity flavors?

optionLabels.boldClassic: I like a strong, full-bodied flavor with deep notes.
optionLabels.milkBalanced: For me, it's all about the balance between smooth coffee and perfect milk.
optionLabels.versatile: I want to learn everything: from earthy and spicy to floral and fresh.
optionLabels.fruityAcidic: I'm looking for light, fresh, and fruity flavors with a bit of acidity.

desiredTempo.title: What is your pace?
desiredTempo.subtitle: How and how much time do you want to spend daily on your coffee journey?

optionDescriptions.quickShot: Fast and strong, teach me the essentials.
optionDescriptions.dailyRoutine: I take the time for a short lesson while drinking my coffee.
optionDescriptions.weekendLover: On the weekend I love to dive into the learning material.
optionDescriptions.ownPace: No fixed time, I prefer to do it at my own pace.

currentMethodes.title: Which brewing methods do you already use?
currentMethodes.subtitle: Select the methods you have equipment for.

extraGear.title: What else is in your kitchen?
extraGear.subtitle: Select the extra gear you already have.

success.title: Your Roadmap is Ready!
success.description: We've tailored the perfect theory course for your coffee setup.

chapterUnlocked.title: Chapter 1 Unlocked!
chapterUnlocked.description: It's time to dive into the fundamentals.

start.title: Ready to Learn?
start.description: Discover the science behind your perfect cup.

about.title: About BrewLingo
about.content: BrewLingo is your ultimate guide to discovering the world of coffee. From bean to cup, learn everything about coffee and making the perfect cup. Developed by Sam Hoeterickx.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.content: Your privacy is important to us. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information when you use the BrewLingo app. We do not share your data with third parties.

termsOfCondition.title: Terms of Condition
termsOfCondition.content: By using the BrewLingo app, you agree to these terms of condition. The content provided in this app is for educational purposes. We reserve the right to modify or terminate the service at any time.

quitConfirm.title: Are you sure?
quitConfirm.subtitle: All progress in this lesson will be lost.
